style_suffix: Photorealistic interior photography. Natural daylight from a single window. Soft warm light. Sharp focus, shallow depth of field. Sage green walls and warm stone tile. Honed quartz and rift oak vanity. Frameless glass. Plants for warmth. Clean composition, no clutter. No people unless specified. No text or logos. Color palette: forest green #2F5D50, sage #7A9E8E, sand #F7F4EF, warm wood, charcoal accents.

images.prompt: A premium Auburn, California primary bathroom remodel. Centered freestanding soaker tub on warm wood plank floor with stone-look porcelain accents. Beyond the tub: a frameless walk-in shower with floor-to-ceiling sage green stone tile, gold-brushed shower fixture, and a vertical niche. Soft morning light through a large window framing oak trees and Sierra foothills. Eucalyptus branches in a vase, neatly folded white bath towels. Warm spa atmosphere.

Bright airy editorial photograph of a stunning clean modern primary bathroom. Wide-angle architectural shot from across the room — pulled-back composition. The bathroom features: a spacious frameless walk-in shower on the right with floor-to-ceiling crisp white marble-look tile and a brushed brass rain head; a freestanding modern white soaker tub centered beneath a large picture window pouring abundant natural daylight; a long warm rift oak floating double vanity with white quartz counter and brushed brass faucets on the left; bright white walls, light wide-plank wood floors. The whole room glows with bright clean daylight — airy, optimistic, happy atmosphere. A relaxed homeowner couple in their late 40s stands near the vanity, smiling and laughing together, casually dressed in cream and oatmeal neutrals — they are small in the wide composition, occupying perhaps 12 percent of the frame, but clearly delighted with the new bathroom. The bathroom is the hero. Magazine-quality interior photography, photorealistic, sharp focus, full depth of field, bright clean white-balanced color grading with no dark shadows or moody tones, premium clean modern aesthetic. No logos, no watermarks, no text, no heavy color grading.

Detail interior shot of a custom Auburn bathroom: a sage green stone-tile walk-in shower with frameless low-iron glass, polished chrome rain head, and a built-in bench. Adjacent rift oak floating vanity with honed white quartz counter and matte black faucets. Window with sheer linen curtain. Calm, durable, foothill spa feel.

Wide-angle photo of a fully remodeled Auburn primary bathroom. Double rift oak vanity with brushed brass hardware on a wall of warm stone tile, large frameless mirror, sage green painted accent wall. To one side, a modern walk-in shower with green-toned tile and frameless glass. Warm wood floors. A freestanding tub near a window with foothill view. Magazine-quality interior photography.

Three-quarter view of a beautifully crafted Auburn primary bathroom shower. Large-format sage stone tile floor to ceiling, recessed niche with eucalyptus, frameless glass, warm wood vanity reflected in the mirror. Matte black shower fixture. Brass hardware accents. Soft morning light, calm composition.

Custom walk-in tile shower in an Auburn home. Floor-to-ceiling green-toned stone porcelain. Frameless low-iron glass enclosure with brass hinges. Linear drain. Wall-mounted rain shower head in matte black. A built-in horizontal niche with bath products. Bench seat in matching stone. Warm window light from outside.

Detail shot of a sage stone tile walk-in shower with a vertical niche, frameless glass panel meeting the wall cleanly, and a polished chrome thermostatic shower fixture. Soft natural light. Photorealistic, magazine quality.

Auburn primary bathroom showing a tub-to-shower conversion: where an old bathtub used to sit is now a wide low-threshold walk-in shower with sage stone tile, built-in bench, and frameless glass. Warm wood vanity to the side. Calm and modern.

Close-up of a low-threshold tub-to-shower conversion in a foothill home. Sage stone tile floor pitched to a linear drain, the threshold barely raised. Frameless glass door, brass handle. Built-in stone bench with a small folded white towel. Plant in the corner.

Curbless walk-in shower in an Auburn primary bathroom. Continuous sage stone tile floor sloped to a linear drain at the back wall. Floor-to-ceiling tile. Frameless glass panel. Polished chrome rain head, hand-held wand. Warm wood floor outside the shower. Window light, plants. Spa feel.
Detail of a frameless glass walk-in shower with linear drain, large-format sage stone tile, and a built-in horizontal niche. Brass shower fixture. Warm window light, eucalyptus, premium feel.

Top-down photo of a designer's table with bathroom remodel material samples: sage green stone tile chips, large-format porcelain slab corner, honed white quartz counter sample, rift oak wood block, brushed brass and matte black faucet handles, white linen towel, blueprint corner peeking in. Soft natural daylight. Editorial styling.

Bright elegant editorial photograph of a stunning modern primary bathroom in a Placer County foothill home. Wide architectural composition. The bathroom features: a freestanding white soaker tub centered beneath a large picture window with oak trees and Sierra foothills visible in soft daylight; a long warm rift oak floating double vanity with honed white quartz counters and brushed brass faucets along the left wall; a frameless glass walk-in shower with floor-to-ceiling soft sage stone tile and a brushed brass rain head on the right; bright white walls, light wide-plank wood floors. Calm, airy, premium spa atmosphere. The bathroom is immaculate and uncluttered. Magazine-quality interior photography, photorealistic, sharp focus, full depth of field, bright clean white-balanced color grading, premium home design publication style. No people, no logos, no watermarks, no text.

Behind-the-scenes shot of a small bathroom remodel crew on site in an Auburn foothill home — a tile setter aligning a large-format sage stone tile on a walk-in shower wall, blue painters tape and tile spacers visible, clean job site, drop cloths on the floor, golden window light. Documentary-style construction photography, no recognizable faces.

Close detail shot of a tile setter's gloved hand pressing a large-format sage green stone tile into thinset on a wall, level and tile spacers visible. Warm window light. Documentary, photorealistic, no recognizable face. Vertical composition.

Bathroom remodel design moodboard laid out on a warm wood table: sage stone tile sample, brass faucet handle, honed white quartz chip, small bottle of plant cuttings, swatch of linen, hand-drawn floor plan corner. Soft window light. Inviting, calm.
